title: Basil Buttered Beans
ingredients: ¼ cup plus 1 tbsp minced fresh basil
instructions:
Trim the green beans and cut into 2” pieces.
In a large saucepan combine the beans, onion, celery and water. Cover and cook for 5 minutes or until the beans are tender. Drain and move to a large serving bowl.
Add the butter, basil, salt and pepper to the beans and toss to coat. Serve immediately.
